hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/tsconfig.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/" 2>/dev/null; cp -r "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/src" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/" && cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && npm install --omit=dev 2>/dev/null && echo 'atlassian-sync: CLI deps installed' || echo 'atlassian-sync: CLI dep install failed')
